title: Piaget boundary learning notes
summary: The material is useful only when translated from abstract psychology language into bounded execution checks. The main operational signal is to treat identity and emotional regulation as behavior-level control loops. A second signal is pacing: sustained growth requires contact with unknowns under bounded load, not large unbounded resets.
key_points: Do not promote trait labels unless repeated micro-behavior evidence exists.
When changing behavior, define a trigger-action-log micro-routine first.
Keep one stable anchor while adding unknowns incrementally.
When self/other-negation language appears, force immediate return to smallest controllable action.
